<!-- GENERATED FILE — DO NOT EDIT. Source: docs/architecture/acceptance-criteria/03-ingestion-common/03.3-change-detection.md -->

# 3.3 Change Detection

Generic change detection on any case class via `Product`. Combines fast `updateDate` pre-filter with full field-by-field diffing. Caller fetches stored entity and passes both versions.

**Standard strategy for bills, members, amendments, committees, and future entity types.** Exception: `VoteChangeDetector` (EXISTS query for position comparison) in vote-ingestion pipeline.

#### `ChangeDetector` — Object

```
object ChangeDetector {
  def detect[T <: Product](
    incoming: T,
    stored: Option[T],
    incomingUpdateDate: Instant,
    storedUpdateDate: Option[Instant]
  ): ChangeReport[T]
}
```

**Detection logic:**
1. `stored == None` → `New(incoming)`
2. `incomingUpdateDate < storedUpdateDate` → `Unchanged` + warning log (data regression, no persist)
3. `incomingUpdateDate == storedUpdateDate` → `Unchanged`
4. `incomingUpdateDate > storedUpdateDate` → full field-by-field diff → `Updated(diffs)` or `Unchanged` (dates differ, all fields identical)

**Field-by-field diffing via `Product`:**
- Uses `productElementNames` (field names) and `productIterator` (values)
- Recurses into nested case classes, reports as `"sponsor.lastName"`
- List fields with `HasNaturalKey` items: match by natural key, report additions/removals/per-item diffs

#### `ChangeReport[T]` — Enum

```
enum ChangeReport[T] {
  case New(entity: T)
  case Updated(diffs: List[FieldDiff])
  case Unchanged
}
```

#### `FieldDiff`

```
case class FieldDiff(fieldName: String, oldValue: Any, newValue: Any)
```

Nested fields: `"sponsor.lastName"`. List changes: `"cosponsors[B000944].party"` (modified), `"cosponsors[+B000944]"` (added), `"cosponsors[-B000944]"` (removed).

#### `HasNaturalKey` — Trait

```
trait HasNaturalKey {
  def naturalKey: String
}
```

DOs appearing in list fields implement this for matching items across old/new lists by key.

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| `stored = None` → `New(incoming)` | No prior record → `ChangeReport.New` |
| `incoming > stored` with changes → `Updated(diffs)` | Title change → `Updated(List(FieldDiff("title", old, new)))` |
| `incoming > stored`, no changes → `Unchanged` | Dates differ, fields identical → `Unchanged` |
| `incoming == stored` → `Unchanged` | Same timestamps → `Unchanged` |
| `incoming < stored` → `Unchanged` + warning | Data regression → `Unchanged`, logs warning |
| Nested case class diffing | Change `sponsor.lastName` → `"sponsor.lastName"` in diff |
| List addition by natural key | New cosponsor → addition reported |
| List removal by natural key | Cosponsor removed → removal reported |
| List item modification | Cosponsor party changed → `"cosponsors[B000944].party"` reported |
| List ordering irrelevant | Same items, different order → no diff |
| Placeholder vs full entity | Mostly-null diffed against full → `Updated` with many diffs |
